nodes.label: Researchers
nodes.title: Publish papers with optimistic abstracts to attract grants and citations. Incentive: career advancement requires positive results.
nodes.role: Produce the raw claims that seed the hype cycle. Grant applications require promising outcomes, so negative results go unpublished.

nodes.label: Universities
nodes.title: Issue press releases that exaggerate research findings. Incentive: prestige, enrollment, and donor funding.
nodes.role: Transform cautious research papers into breathless press releases. PR offices optimize for media pickup, not scientific accuracy.

nodes.label: Tech Media
nodes.title: Write attention-grabbing headlines that strip nuance from research. Incentive: clicks, ad revenue, and audience growth.
nodes.role: Convert press releases into viral headlines. 'Marginal improvement in error rates' becomes 'Quantum Breakthrough Could Change Everything.'

nodes.label: Social Media
nodes.title: Viral sharing with no fact-checking or context. Incentive: engagement metrics and influencer status.
nodes.role: Strip remaining context from media articles. A nuanced 2,000-word piece becomes a breathless tweet with zero caveats.

nodes.label:
VCs /
Investors
nodes.title: Fund QC startups based on hype narratives. Incentive: fear of missing out on the next transformative technology.
nodes.role: Pour money into QC companies based on optimistic projections. Need the hype to continue to justify portfolio valuations.

nodes.label: QC Startups
nodes.title: Make bold claims to attract funding and talent. Incentive: survival depends on next funding round.
nodes.role: Produce the most aggressive claims because their survival depends on it. Understating capabilities means no next funding round.

nodes.label:
Government
Agencies
nodes.title: Fund QC based on strategic competition fears. Incentive: national security narrative and budget justification.
nodes.role: Fund QC programs driven by 'quantum race' fears. China is investing, so we must invest more, regardless of technical feasibility.

nodes.label: Consultants
nodes.title: Sell 'quantum readiness' reports and advisory services. Incentive: billable hours from corporate anxiety.
nodes.role: Generate trillion-dollar market projections that justify corporate QC spending. Revenue depends on executives believing QC is imminent.

nodes.label: Conferences
nodes.title: Create echo chambers where optimists reinforce each other. Incentive: ticket sales and sponsor revenue.
nodes.role: Curate speakers who tell positive stories. Skeptics don't sell tickets. The result is a self-reinforcing echo chamber.

nodes.label:
Corporate
R&D
nodes.title: Announce milestone achievements to justify R&D budgets. Incentive: internal budget allocation and public perception.
nodes.role: Issue milestone announcements to justify budgets. 'We achieved X qubits' without mentioning those qubits can't do useful work.
